milestone: Villani CLI Agent Mode Milestone 2: Shared CLI Subprocess Runtime

process_strategy.common: asyncio.create_subprocess_exec with separate argv elements, exact cwd/environment, piped-and-closed stdin, concurrent bounded stdout/stderr drains, no shell
process_strategy.posix: start_new_session; SIGTERM invocation process group; bounded wait; SIGKILL group; await/reap parent; verify group disappearance
process_strategy.windows: CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP plus CREATE_SUSPENDED; assign kill-on-close Job Object before resuming owned initial thread; CTRL_BREAK grace; TerminateJobObject after expiry; await parent; close job; taskkill tree fallback only on failed job attachment
